details.text: Have you ever in the past consumed or currently consume tobacco in any form like Cigarette,Bidi,Pan,Gutkha?
Have you ever in the past or are currently consuming Narcotics?
Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Diabetes,high blood sugar
Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for High blood pressure,Hypertension ,Elevated Cholesterol,Lipids?

Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Chest pain, heart attack, palpitation, any other heart disease or circulatory disease?

Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Any lung,respiratory Disease or Urine,Kidney disease or any Liver ,gastric disorders?
Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Cancer or tumor of any kind?
Do you or your spouse has been tested positive or is under treatment for HIV , AIDS or Sexually transmitted diseases (e.g. syphilis, gonorrhea, etc.)?
Have you ever been diagnosed and treated for any of following conditions or are currently being treated or underwent surgery for Any Accidental injury ,Disability or impairment?
Do you have any other health condition or are you currently/in past were under any treatment for any health condition not covered above?
Have you undergone any investigations like blood ,urine test , X -ray , ECG or any special test such as TMT , CT scan, MRI?

examples: Prithvi, hold this phone like this.
